title: Mexican Spicy Shrimp Stew
description: A flavorful and spicy stew made with shrimp, a blend of Mexican spices, and fluffy corn tortillas.

ingredients.name: Mexican spices
ingredients.notes: dried oregano, cumin, and chili powder

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced tomatoes, Mexican spices, and chili flakes (if using). Cook for 1 minute.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Add the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes.
Stir in the fluffy corn tortillas.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro (if desired).
